title: Academy Trivia — Apple, Mentors & Inside Jokes

questions.text: What specific problem-solving framework does Apple use to structure the entire 9-to-10 month curriculum at the academy?
Which programming language did Apple design Swift to replace?
Before becoming a mentor in Jakarta, Farid was a mentor in which academy?
What was Apple's very first official company logo?
options: Isaac Newton sitting under a tree

questions.text: In almost all of Apple's official product marketing images, the time on the devices is set to 9:41 AM. Why?
options: It is the exact time Apple stock went public.
It is the time Steve Jobs unveiled the original iPhone in 2007.
It represents the optimal lighting for product photography.
It's a tribute to the time when Steve Jobs passed away

questions.text: Where in the world did Apple launch its very first Apple Developer Academy in 2013?
Which mentor likes to sew in her spare time?
Which group of academy staff commute with KRL green line every day?
Which Guiding Activity in Challenge 2 started with Alicia Keys' song?
